prevalence.source: WHO Europe / European psychiatric epidemiology syntheses

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11: hypomania + major depression; no manic episode

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with access to specialist care and maintenance therapy

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Structured assessment reduces misdiagnosis in many systems
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Mood stabilizers (including lamotrigine) and atypical antipsychotics; psychoeducation and relapse prevention
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access variability and comorbid substance use
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Broad access to evidence-based care in many member states
